2606.26027.title: Why Multi-Step Tool-Use Reinforcement Learning Collapses and How Supervisory Signals Fix It
2606.26027.paper_summary: Tool use enables large language models (LLMs) to perform complex tasks, and recent agentic reinforcement learning (RL) methods show promise for enhancing model capabilities. However, RL alone often leads to instability or limited gains in tool-use tasks. In our experiments, some models exhibit catastrophic collapse, where performance abruptly drops and tool-invocation structures fail. The analysis reveals that these failures stem from unexpected probability spikes in specific control tokens, disrupting structured execution, yet the underlying tool-use capability remains intact, merely obscured by specific formats. To address this, we systematically investigate a diverse set of supervisory signals, including off-policy supervision, hint-based guidance, erroneous example supervision, and others, applied under both synchronous and interleaved training schemes. We find that interleaving supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with RL substantially improves stability, but exhibits degraded performance under format and content out-of-distribution (OOD) evaluation. We also analyze the impact of learning rates and generalization across settings. These results highlight the importance of understanding RL failures and demonstrate how diverse supervisory signals can guide exploratory learning, enabling robust training of LLMs for complex, multi-step tool-use tasks. Our Code is available at https://github.com/hypasd-art/Tool-RL-Box.
2606.26027.paper_summary_zh: 工具使用使大型語言模型（LLMs）能夠執行複雜任務，而最近的代理強化學習（RL）方法顯示出增強模型能力的潛力。<lb/>然而，僅依賴RL通常會導致不穩定或在工具使用任務中獲得有限的增益。<lb/>在我們的實驗中，一些模型表現出災難性的崩潰，性能突然下降，工具調用結構失效。<lb/>分析顯示，這些失敗源於特定控制標記中意外的概率峰值，干擾了結構化執行，但潛在的工具使用能力仍然完好，只是被特定格式所掩蓋。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們系統地調查了一組多樣的監督信號，包括非策略監督、提示基指導、錯誤示例監督等，在同步和交錯訓練方案下應用。<lb/>我們發現，將監督微調（SFT）與RL交錯進行顯著改善了穩定性，但在格式和內容的分佈外（OOD）評估中表現下降。<lb/>我們還分析了學習率和跨設置的泛化影響。<lb/>這些結果凸顯了理解RL失敗的重要性，並展示了多樣的監督信號如何引導探索性學習，使LLMs能夠穩健地訓練以應對複雜的多步工具使用任務。<lb/>我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/hypasd-art/Tool-RL-Box 獲得。
2606.26027.author: Yupu Hao et.al.
2606.26027.authors: Yupu Hao, Zhuoran Jin, Huanxuan Liao, Kang Liu, Jun Zhao
